    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    addExpense(Expense) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Adds an expense to the in-memory list and triggers budget alert checks.
    alertManager - Variable in class Controllers.BudgetManager
     
    AlertManager - Class in Controllers
    Manages budget alert notifications for the user.
    AlertManager() - Constructor for class Controllers.AlertManager
    Constructs a new AlertManager with permissions granted by default.
    AlertManager.AlertCallback - Interface in Controllers
    Callback interface for receiving alert events.
    allowanceField - Variable in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
     
    amount - Variable in class Models.Expense
     
    applyFilterLogic() - Method in class Views.HistoryActivity
    Applies the selected category and date range filters to the expense list.
    applyRollover() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Applies a rollover by adding the remaining balance to the total allowance and recalculating the daily limit.
    applyWhiteForeground(JLabel...) - Method in class Views.DashboardActivity
    Applies white foreground color to all provided labels.
    AuthActivity - Class in Views
    The authentication screen of the Masroofy application.
    AuthActivity(BudgetManager, JFrame) - Constructor for class Views.AuthActivity
    Constructs the AuthActivity panel with Sign Up and Sign In buttons.

    B

    budgetController - Variable in class Controllers.ExpenseController
     
    BudgetCycle - Class in Models
    Represents a single budget cycle for a user.
    BudgetCycle() - Constructor for class Models.BudgetCycle
    Creates an empty budget cycle instance.
    budgetManager - Variable in class Controllers.ReportController
     
    budgetManager - Variable in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
     
    budgetManager - Variable in class Views.DashboardActivity
     
    budgetManager - Variable in class Views.ExpensesEntryActivity
     
    budgetManager - Variable in class Views.HistoryActivity
     
    BudgetManager - Class in Controllers
    Central controller that manages all budget-related operations for the application.
    BudgetManager() - Constructor for class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Constructs a new BudgetManager with fresh DAOs and alert manager.
    buildUI() - Method in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
    Builds and lays out the UI components for the cycle setup screen.

    C

    calculateDailyLimit() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Calculates the safe daily spending limit based on the total allowance and cycle duration.
    calculateDaysRemaining(Date) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Calculates the number of days remaining until the given end date (inclusive).
    calculateRemainingBalance(List) - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Calculates the remaining balance after summing all provided expenses.
    calculateTotalDays() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Calculates the total number of days in this budget cycle (inclusive).
    callback - Variable in class Controllers.AlertManager
     
    canAddExpense(double) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Checks whether a new expense of the given amount can be added without exceeding any budget limit.
    Category - Class in Models
    Represents a spending category used to classify expenses.
    Category(int, String, String) - Constructor for class Models.Category
    Constructs a Category with a known database ID.
    Category(String, String) - Constructor for class Models.Category
    Constructs a Category without an ID (used before saving to the database).
    categoryFilter - Variable in class Views.HistoryActivity
     
    categoryId - Variable in class Models.Category
     
    categoryId - Variable in class Models.Expense
     
    categoryTotals - Variable in class Models.DashboardModel
     
    clearNotifications() - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Clears the last alert timestamp, allowing new alerts to be sent immediately.
    columnNames - Variable in class Views.TransactionAdapter
     
    connect() - Static method in class Database.DatabaseManager
    Opens and returns a new connection to the SQLite database.
    Controllers - package Controllers
     
    correctPin - Variable in class Views.PinActivity
     
    createFor(BudgetManager) - Static method in class Controllers.ExpenseController
    Factory method that creates an ExpenseController with a default TransactionDAO.
    createLabel(String) - Method in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
    Creates a white-styled label used by the cycle setup form.
    createStyledButton(String) - Method in class Views.AuthActivity
    Creates a consistently styled button used on the auth screen.
    createTables() - Static method in class Database.DatabaseManager
    Creates all required application tables in the database if they do not already exist.
    currentCycle - Variable in class Controllers.BudgetManager
     
    currentPin - Variable in class Controllers.BudgetManager
     
    cycleDAO - Variable in class Controllers.BudgetManager
     
    CycleDAO - Class in Database
    Data Access Object for budget cycle persistence.
    CycleDAO() - Constructor for class Database.CycleDAO
    Constructs a new CycleDAO for budget cycle persistence.
    cycleId - Variable in class Models.BudgetCycle
     
    cycleId - Variable in class Models.Expense
     
    CycleSetupActivity - Class in Views
    Screen for initializing a new budget cycle.
    CycleSetupActivity(BudgetManager, JFrame) - Constructor for class Views.CycleSetupActivity
    Constructs the cycle setup screen.

    D

    dailySpent - Variable in class Models.DashboardModel
     
    dashboard - Variable in class Views.HistoryActivity
     
    DashboardActivity - Class in Views
    The main dashboard screen of the Masroofy application.
    DashboardActivity(BudgetManager) - Constructor for class Views.DashboardActivity
    Constructs the DashboardActivity and initializes all UI components.
    DashboardModel - Class in Models
    Immutable model representing the data displayed on the Dashboard screen.
    DashboardModel(double, double, double, double, Map, String) - Constructor for class Models.DashboardModel
    Constructs a DashboardModel with all required dashboard data.
    data - Variable in class Views.SpendingChart
     
    Database - package Database
     
    DatabaseManager - Class in Database
    Manages the SQLite database connection and schema initialization.
    DatabaseManager() - Constructor for class Database.DatabaseManager
    Prevents instantiation of this utility class.
    dateFormat - Variable in class Views.TransactionAdapter
     
    DB_NAME - Static variable in class Database.DatabaseManager
     
    deleteExpense(int) - Method in class Database.TransactionDAO
    Deletes an expense record from the database by its ID.

    E

    editExpense(double, int, String) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Updates this expense with new values for amount, category, and notes.
    endDate - Variable in class Models.BudgetCycle
     
    endDateField - Variable in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
     
    endDateField - Variable in class Views.HistoryActivity
     
    Expense - Class in Models
    Represents a single expense entry recorded by the user.
    Expense(double, int, String) - Constructor for class Models.Expense
    Constructs a new Expense with the given amount, category, and notes.
    expenseController - Variable in class Views.HistoryActivity
     
    ExpenseController - Class in Controllers
    Controller responsible for processing expense transactions.
    ExpenseController(TransactionDAO, BudgetManager) - Constructor for class Controllers.ExpenseController
    Constructs an ExpenseController with explicit DAO and manager dependencies.
    ExpenseController.ExpenseResult - Class in Controllers
    Represents the outcome of processing an expense.
    expenseId - Variable in class Models.Expense
     
    expenseList - Variable in class Views.TransactionAdapter
     
    ExpenseResult(boolean, String, String) - Constructor for class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Constructs an ExpenseResult without a warning message.
    ExpenseResult(boolean, String, String, String) - Constructor for class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Constructs an ExpenseResult with an optional warning message.
    expenses - Variable in class Controllers.BudgetManager
     
    ExpensesEntryActivity - Class in Views
    A dialog window that allows the user to enter and submit a new expense.
    ExpensesEntryActivity(BudgetManager) - Constructor for class Views.ExpensesEntryActivity
    Constructs the ExpensesEntryActivity window and initializes all UI components.
    expenseTable - Variable in class Views.HistoryActivity
     

    F

    feedbackLabel - Variable in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
     
    filterHistory(int, String, String) - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController
    Returns a filtered list of expenses based on category and date range.

    G

    generateSummaryReport() - Method in class Controllers.ReportController
    Generates a formatted financial summary report for the current budget cycle.
    getAlertManager() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the AlertManager used to trigger budget notifications.
    getAllExpenses() - Method in class Database.TransactionDAO
    Retrieves all expense records from the database, ordered by date descending.
    getAllNames() - Static method in class Models.Category
    Returns a list of all predefined category names.
    getAmount() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Returns the monetary amount of this expense.
    getCategoryId() - Method in class Models.Category
    Returns the unique identifier of this category.
    getCategoryId() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Returns the category ID associated with this expense.
    getCategoryId(String) - Method in class Views.ExpensesEntryActivity
    Converts a category name string to its corresponding numeric ID.
    getCategoryName(int) - Method in class Views.HistoryActivity
    Resolves the display name for the given category ID.
    getColumnCount() - Method in class Views.TransactionAdapter
    Returns the number of columns in the table.
    getColumnName(int) - Method in class Views.TransactionAdapter
    Returns the display name of the specified column.
    getCurrentCycle() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the currently active budget cycle.
    getCurrentPin() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the PIN of the currently logged-in user.
    getCycleId() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the unique identifier of this budget cycle.
    getCycleId() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Returns the ID of the budget cycle this expense belongs to.
    getDailySpent() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Calculates the total amount spent today across all expenses.
    getDailySpent() - Method in class Models.DashboardModel
    Returns the amount spent today only (not the full cycle).
    getDashboardData() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Builds and returns the dashboard data model for the current budget cycle.
    getEndDate() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the end date of this budget cycle.
    getExpenseId() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Returns the unique identifier of this expense.
    getExpenseRejectionReason(double) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the reason why an expense of the given amount would be rejected, or null if the expense is allowed.
    getExpenses() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the list of expenses recorded in the current cycle.
    getExpensesByCycle(int, String) - Method in class Database.CycleDAO
    Returns all Expense records that belong to the specified cycle and user.
    getFilteredExpenses(int, String, String) - Method in class Database.TransactionDAO
    Retrieves a filtered list of expenses based on category and date range.
    getFirstPin() - Method in class Database.UserDAO
    Retrieves the first PIN stored in the database.
    getFixedDailyLimit() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the fixed daily spending limit based on the total allowance and cycle duration.
    getIcon() - Method in class Models.Category
    Returns the icon string for this category.
    getIdByName(String) - Static method in class Models.Category
    Returns the category ID corresponding to the given name.
    getLastSavedCycle(String) - Method in class Database.CycleDAO
    Retrieves the most recent budget cycle saved for the specified user.
    getMessage() - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Returns the primary user-facing message for this result.
    getName() - Method in class Models.Category
    Returns the display name of this category.
    getNameById(int) - Static method in class Models.Category
    Returns the category name corresponding to the given ID.
    getNotes() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Returns the optional notes attached to this expense.
    getPieChartData() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Aggregates expenses by category name and returns a map suitable for pie chart display.
    getRejectionType() - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Returns the rejection type code for this result.
    getRemainingBalance() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the current remaining balance for this cycle.
    getRemainingBudget() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the remaining budget for the current cycle after all expenses.
    getRemainingBudget() - Method in class Models.DashboardModel
    Returns the remaining budget for the current cycle.
    getRowCount() - Method in class Views.TransactionAdapter
    Returns the number of rows in the table (one per expense).
    getSafeDailyLimit() - Method in class Models.DashboardModel
    Returns the recommended safe daily spending limit.
    getSavedPin() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Retrieves the first PIN stored in the database.
    getSpendingByCategory() - Method in class Controllers.ReportController
    Aggregates total spending per category for the current budget cycle.
    getSpendingPercentage() - Method in class Models.DashboardModel
    Calculates the percentage of the total allowance that has been spent in the cycle.
    getSpentPercentage() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the percentage of the total allowance that has been spent.
    getSpentPercentage() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Calculates the percentage of the total allowance that has been spent.
    getStartDate() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the start date of this budget cycle.
    getStatusColor() - Method in class Models.DashboardModel
    Returns the color associated with the current budget status.
    getStatusMessage() - Method in class Models.DashboardModel
    Returns a human-readable status message based on the current budget status.
    getTimestamp() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Returns the timestamp when this expense was created.
    getTodayRemainingDailyLimit() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the remaining daily budget for today after subtracting today's spending.
    getTotalAllowance() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the total allowance (budget) for this cycle.
    getTotalAllowance() - Method in class Models.DashboardModel
    Returns the total budget allowance for the current cycle.
    getTotalSpent() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Returns the total amount spent in the current cycle.
    getUserPin() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the PIN of the user who owns this cycle.
    getUserPin() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Returns the PIN of the user who recorded this expense.
    getValueAt(int, int) - Method in class Views.TransactionAdapter
    Returns the value to display in a specific table cell.
    getWarning() - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Returns an optional warning message associated with this result.
    goDashboard() - Method in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
    Navigates to the dashboard screen after a successful cycle creation.

    H

    handleLogin() - Method in class Views.PinActivity
    Validates the entered PIN and navigates the user to the next screen when authentication succeeds.
    handleSavePin() - Method in class Views.PinSetupActivity
    Handles the save action for PIN setup, validating the entered PIN and creating a new user account when valid.
    hasWarning() - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Returns whether this result carries a non-empty warning message.
    HistoryActivity - Class in Views
    A window that displays historical expense transactions.
    HistoryActivity(BudgetManager, DashboardActivity) - Constructor for class Views.HistoryActivity
    Constructs a history window for the current user's expenses.

    I

    icon - Variable in class Models.Category
     
    initComponents() - Method in class Views.ExpensesEntryActivity
    Initializes and lays out all UI components including labels, text fields, category dropdown, and the save button.
    initViews() - Method in class Views.DashboardActivity
    Initializes and adds all UI components to the panel including labels, progress bar, spending chart, and action buttons.
    isEightyPercentReached() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Checks whether 80% or more of the total allowance has been spent.
    isSameDay(Date, Date) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Determines whether two dates fall on the same calendar day.
    isSuccess() - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Returns whether the expense was successfully processed.

    jButton1 - Variable in class Views.ExpensesEntryActivity

    L

    lastAlertSent - Variable in class Controllers.AlertManager
     
    loadExistingBudget() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Loads the most recent budget cycle and its expenses for the current user from the database.
    loadExpenses() - Method in class Views.HistoryActivity
    Refreshes the table with the current expense list from the budget manager.
    loadHistory() - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController
    Returns the full expense history for the current budget cycle.
    loginBtn - Variable in class Views.PinActivity
     

    M

    main - Class in Unnamed Package
    Entry point for the Masroofy budgeting application.
    main() - Constructor for class main
    Constructs the main application launcher.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class main
    Launches the Masroofy budgeting application and initializes the database.
    mainFrame - Variable in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
     
    mainFrame - Variable in class Views.PinSetupActivity
     
    manager - Variable in class Views.PinActivity
     
    manager - Variable in class Views.PinSetupActivity
     
    mapResultSetToExpense(ResultSet) - Method in class Database.TransactionDAO
    Maps a database ResultSet row to an Expense object.
    message - Variable in class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
     
    Models - package Models
     
    modifyTransaction(int, String, Expense) - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController
    Edits or deletes an existing expense transaction by ID.
    monitorBudgetTotalSpent(double, double) - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Monitors total cycle spending and triggers an alert if 80% or 100% of the total allowance has been spent.
    monitorDailyLimit(double, double) - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Monitors today's spending against the daily limit and triggers an alert if 80% or 100% of the daily limit has been reached.

    N

    name - Variable in class Models.Category
     
    navigateToApplicationFlow(JFrame, BudgetManager) - Static method in class main
    Navigates the user to the appropriate next screen based on whether a budget cycle is already active.
    notes - Variable in class Models.Expense

    onAlert(String, String) - Method in interface Controllers.AlertManager.AlertCallback
    Called when a budget alert should be displayed to the user.

    Paints the pie chart component.

    PinActivity - Class in Views
    PinActivity — kept for backward compatibility.
    PinActivity(BudgetManager, String, Runnable) - Constructor for class Views.PinActivity
    Constructs the legacy PIN login panel.
    pinExists(String) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Checks whether a given PIN is already registered in the database.
    pinExists(String) - Method in class Database.UserDAO
    Checks whether a given PIN already exists in the database.
    pinField - Variable in class Views.PinActivity
     
    pinField - Variable in class Views.PinSetupActivity
     
    PinSetupActivity - Class in Views
    PinSetupActivity — Sign Up screen.
    PinSetupActivity(BudgetManager, JFrame) - Constructor for class Views.PinSetupActivity
    Constructs the PIN setup screen used for new user registration.
    populateCategories() - Method in class Views.ExpensesEntryActivity
    Populates the category dropdown with all predefined category names.
    processExpense(double, int, String) - Method in class Controllers.ExpenseController
    Validates and processes a new expense entry.

    R

    refreshBudgetState() - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Recalculates the remaining balance for the current cycle based on the current expense list.
    refreshUI() - Method in class Views.DashboardActivity
    Refreshes all UI labels, progress bar, and chart with the latest budget data.
    registerPin(String) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Registers a new user PIN in the database.
    registerPin(String) - Method in class Database.UserDAO
    Registers a new user by inserting their PIN into the database.
    rejectionType - Variable in class Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
     
    remainingBalance - Variable in class Models.BudgetCycle
     
    reportController - Variable in class Views.DashboardActivity
     
    ReportController - Class in Controllers
    Controller responsible for generating budget reports and spending summaries.
    ReportController(BudgetManager) - Constructor for class Controllers.ReportController
    Constructs a ReportController with the given budget manager.
    requestPermissions() - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Grants notification permissions for this manager.
    resetCycle() - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Resets the cycle by zeroing out the allowance, remaining balance, and daily limit.

    S

    safeDailyLimit - Variable in class Models.BudgetCycle
     
    safeDailyLimit - Variable in class Models.DashboardModel
     
    save() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Placeholder method for persisting the expense.
    saveBtn - Variable in class Views.PinSetupActivity
     
    saveCycle() - Method in class Views.CycleSetupActivity
    Reads user input, validates the cycle fields, and attempts to start a new budget cycle.
    saveExpense(Expense) - Method in class Database.TransactionDAO
    Inserts a new expense record into the database using today's date.
    saveNewCycle(BudgetCycle, String) - Method in class Database.CycleDAO
    Saves a new budget cycle for the given user and assigns the generated cycle ID to the BudgetCycle instance.
    savePin(String) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Saves a PIN by registering it in the database.
    sendNotification(String, String) - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Dispatches the alert to the registered callback, or logs it to the console if no callback is set.
    setAmount(double) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Sets the monetary amount of this expense.
    setCallback(AlertManager.AlertCallback) - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Registers the callback that will receive alert events.
    setCategoryId(int) - Method in class Models.Category
    Sets the unique identifier of this category.
    setCategoryId(int) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Sets the category ID for this expense.
    setCurrentPin(String) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Sets the PIN of the currently logged-in user.
    setCycleId(int) - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Sets the unique identifier of this budget cycle.
    setCycleId(int) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Sets the ID of the budget cycle this expense belongs to.
    setData(Map) - Method in class Views.SpendingChart
    Sets the spending data to be visualized and triggers a repaint.
    setEndDate(Date) - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Sets the end date of this budget cycle.
    setExpenseId(int) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Sets the unique identifier of this expense.
    setExpenses(List) - Method in class Views.TransactionAdapter
    Updates the displayed expense list and notifies the table to refresh.
    setIcon(String) - Method in class Models.Category
    Sets the icon string for this category.
    setName(String) - Method in class Models.Category
    Sets the display name of this category.
    setNotes(String) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Sets the optional notes for this expense.
    setStartDate(Date) - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Sets the start date of this budget cycle.
    setTimestamp(Date) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Sets the timestamp for this expense.
    setTotalAllowance(double) - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Sets the total allowance for this cycle.
    setupUI() - Method in class Views.HistoryActivity
    Builds the history window UI and attaches action listeners.
    setUserPin(String) - Method in class Models.BudgetCycle
    Sets the PIN of the user who owns this cycle.
    setUserPin(String) - Method in class Models.Expense
    Sets the PIN of the user who recorded this expense.
    shouldSuppressAlert() - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Determines whether an alert should be suppressed based on the one-hour cooldown window.
    showSignInDialog(BudgetManager, JFrame) - Method in class Views.AuthActivity
    Displays a dialog prompting the user to enter their registered PIN.
    spendingChart - Variable in class Views.DashboardActivity
     
    SpendingChart - Class in Views
    A custom Swing panel that renders a pie chart of spending by category.
    SpendingChart() - Constructor for class Views.SpendingChart
    Constructs a new SpendingChart panel.
    startCycle(double, Date, Date) - Method in class Controllers.BudgetManager
    Creates and saves a new budget cycle for the current user.

    styleButton(JButton) - Method in class Views.DashboardActivity
    Applies a consistent gold-on-black style to the given button.

    TransactionAdapter - Class in Views
    A Swing TableModel adapter for displaying a list of Expense objects in a JTable.

    Constructs a TransactionAdapter with the given list of expenses.
    transactionDAO - Variable in class Controllers.ExpenseController
     
    TransactionDAO - Class in Database
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing expense transaction records in the database.
    TransactionDAO() - Constructor for class Database.TransactionDAO
    Constructs a new TransactionDAO for expense persistence operations.
    triggerAlert(double) - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Triggers a generic budget percentage alert if suppression conditions are not met.
    triggerAlert(String, String) - Method in class Controllers.AlertManager
    Triggers an alert with a custom title and message if suppression conditions are not met.

    U

    updateExpense(int, double, int, String) - Method in class Database.TransactionDAO
    Updates the amount, category, and notes of an existing expense by its ID.

    Updates the table rows to display the provided expenses.
    userDAO - Variable in class Controllers.BudgetManager

    UserDAO() - Constructor for class Database.UserDAO
    Constructs a new UserDAO for user PIN persistence operations.

    validateAmount() - Method in class Models.Expense
    Validates that the expense amount is greater than zero.

    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form
